name: Adlam
typography_quirks: Invented by two teenage brothers in Guinea to write the Fulani language. Written RTL, cursive connections, contains upper/lowercase variants.

name: Afaka
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Caucasian Albanian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Ahom, Tai Ahom
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Arabic
typography_quirks: Cursive script where characters change shape contextually (Initial, Medial, Final, Isolated). No capital letters. Uses vowel marks (harakat) optionally.

name: Imperial Aramaic
typography_quirks: Lingua franca script of the Neo-Assyrian and Persian Empires. Ancestor of Arabic, Hebrew, and Brahmi.

name: Armenian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Avestan
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Balinese
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Bamum
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Bassa Vah
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Batak
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Bengali (Bangla)
typography_quirks: Horizontal top line (shirorekha). Less angular than Devanagari. Rich inventory of conjunct consonants.

name: Beria Erfe
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Bhaiksuki
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Blissymbols
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written LTR.

name: Bopomofo
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Brahmi
typography_quirks: Ancestral to nearly all South and Southeast Asian writing systems. Deciphered in the 19th century.

name: Braille
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Buginese
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Buhid
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Chakma
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Unified Canadian Aboriginal Syllabics
typography_quirks: The vowel of a syllable is indicated by the spatial orientation (rotation) of the consonant shape (e.g. ᐱ 'pi', ᐳ 'pu', ᐸ 'pa').

name: Carian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Cham
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Cherokee
typography_quirks: Invented by Sequoyah. Characters resemble Latin letters but represent completely different syllables (e.g. 'D' is 'a', 'R' is 'e').

name: Chisoi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Chorasmian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Cirth
typography_quirks: Runic-like constructed script designed by J.R.R. Tolkien. Used by Dwarves in Middle-earth.

name: Coptic
typography_quirks: Adapted Greek alphabet with 7 demotic-derived signs for Egyptian phonemes. Still used liturgically in the Coptic Church.

name: Cypro-Minoan
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Cypriot syllabary
typography_quirks: Cypro-syllabic script used to write Greek and Eteocypriot. Written right-to-left.

name: Cyrillic
typography_quirks: Derived from Greek uncial. Bicameral casing. Widely used across Eastern Europe and Northern Asia.

name: Devanagari (Nagari)
typography_quirks: Characterized by a continuous horizontal hanging line (shirorekha). Consonants have an inherent 'a' vowel which is modified by diacritics.

name: Dives Akuru
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Dogra
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Deseret (Mormon)
typography_quirks: Phonetic alphabet developed at the University of Deseret under Brigham Young for the Mormon community.

name: Duployan shorthand, Duployan stenography
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Egyptian demotic
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written RTL.

name: Egyptian hieratic
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written RTL.

name: Egyptian hieroglyphs
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written RTL.

name: Elbasan
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Elymaic
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Ethiopic (Geʻez)
typography_quirks: Evolved from South Arabian abjad into an abugida by adding vowel appendages and modifications directly onto the consonants.

name: Garay
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Khutsuri (Asomtavruli and Nuskhuri)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Georgian (Mkhedruli and Mtavruli)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Glagolitic
typography_quirks: Created by Saints Cyril and Methodius. Highly ornate, symbolic letter designs to transcribe Old Church Slavonic.

name: Gunjala Gondi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Masaram Gondi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Gothic
typography_quirks: Invented by Bishop Ulfilas. Relies on Greek letterforms with borrowings from Latin and Runic to transcribe Gothic translations of the Bible.

name: Grantha
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Greek
typography_quirks: First writing system to use separate symbols for vowels. Dual-casing introduced in Hellenistic period.

name: Gujarati
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Gurung Khema
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Gurmukhi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Hangul (Hangŭl, Hangeul)
typography_quirks: Featural alphabet. Letters are grouped visually into syllabic square blocks rather than written sequentially in a line.

name: Han (Hanzi, Kanji, Hanja)
typography_quirks: Logographic system. Characters represent morphemes or words. No word spacing. Historically written vertically top-to-bottom, now primarily LTR.

name: Hanunoo (Hanunóo)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Hatran
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Hebrew
typography_quirks: Square style characters. Uses optional vowel dots (niqqud). Five letters have special final forms (sofit). No capitalization.

name: Hiragana
typography_quirks: Curved, cursive syllabary developed from simplified full kanji characters. Used for native grammar, particles, and verb endings.

name: Anatolian Hieroglyphs (Luwian Hieroglyphs, Hittite Hieroglyphs)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written Boustrophedon.

name: Pahawh Hmong
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Nyiakeng Puachue Hmong
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Old Hungarian (Hungarian Runic)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Indus (Harappan)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written RTL.

name: Old Italic (Etruscan, Oscan, etc.)
typography_quirks: Old Italic alphabets used by Etruscans, Oscans, Umbrians. Predecessor of the Latin alphabet.

name: Javanese
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Jurchen
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written TTB.

name: Kayah Li
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Katakana
typography_quirks: Angled, simplified syllabary derived from parts of kanji characters. Used for loanwords, emphasis, and scientific names.

name: Kawi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Kharoshthi
typography_quirks: Ancient Indo-Iranian script written right-to-left. Developed under Aramaic influence in Gandhara.

name: Khmer
typography_quirks: Features subjoined consonant symbols (co-consonants) written underneath main letters. Inherent vowels differ by consonant series (O-series / A-series).

name: Khojki
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Khitan large script
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written TTB.

name: Khitan small script
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written TTB.

name: Kannada
typography_quirks: Extremely similar to Telugu. Rounded characters. Uses subjoined consonant glyphs to express clusters.

name: Kpelle
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Kirat Rai
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Kaithi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Tai Tham (Lanna)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Lao
typography_quirks: Similar to Thai, but curved and simplified. Features spelling reforms that made it highly phonetic compared to Thai.

name: Latin
typography_quirks: Features letter cases (capital and lowercase). Highly standardized word spacing and punctuation. Widely used for Romanic, Germanic, Slavic, and other languages.

name: Leke
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Lepcha (Róng)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Limbu
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Linear A
typography_quirks: Minoan script of ancient Crete. Remaining undeciphered to this day.

name: Linear B
typography_quirks: Deciphered by Michael Ventris as Mycenaean Greek. Syllabic characters plus logograms.

name: Lisu (Fraser)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Loma
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Lycian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Lydian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Mahajani
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Makasar
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Mandaic, Mandaean
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Manichaean
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Marchen
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Mayan hieroglyphs
typography_quirks: Highly pictorial glyph blocks containing both logograms and phonetic syllables. Written in double columns, top-to-bottom, left-to-right.

name: Medefaidrin (Oberi Okaime, Oberi Ɔkaimɛ)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Mende Kikakui
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written RTL.

name: Meroitic Cursive
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written RTL.

name: Meroitic Hieroglyphs
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written RTL.

name: Malayalam
typography_quirks: Rounded character forms. Largest number of letters of all Indian languages. Distinctive 'chillu' letters.

name: Modi, Moḍī
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Mongolian
typography_quirks: Written vertically from top to bottom, with columns progressing left to right. Letters have initial, medial, and final contextual forms.

name: Moon (Moon code, Moon script, Moon type)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Mro, Mru
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Meitei Mayek (Meithei, Meetei)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Multani
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Myanmar (Burmese)
native_example: မြန်မာဘာသာ
typography_quirks: Consists of highly circular loops, developed due to writing on fragile palm leaves. Uses complex stacking of consonants.

name: Nag Mundari
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Nandinagari
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Old North Arabian (Ancient North Arabian)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Nabataean
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Newa, Newar, Newari, Nepāla lipi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Naxi Dongba (na²¹ɕi³³ to³³ba²¹, Nakhi Tomba)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written LTR.

name: Naxi Geba (na²¹ɕi³³ gʌ²¹ba²¹, 'Na-'Khi ²Ggŏ-¹baw, Nakhi Geba)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: N’Ko
typography_quirks: Invented by Solomana Kante to write Manding languages. Written RTL, letters join together cursively like Arabic, uses diacritics for vowels and tones.

name: Nüshu
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written TTB.

name: Ogham
typography_quirks: Characters represent notches or lines cut across a central edge (stemline) on stone pillars. Read bottom-to-top on stone, or LTR in manuscripts.

name: Ol Chiki (Ol Cemet’, Ol, Santali)
typography_quirks: Created by Pandit Raghunath Murmu to write Santali. Letter shapes are derived from natural shapes and actions (e.g. 'O' is a blowing mouth).

name: Ol Onal
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Old Turkic, Orkhon Runic
typography_quirks: Old Turkic runes. Symmetrical lines carved in rock in the Orkhon Valley. Written from right to left.

name: Oriya (Odia)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Osage
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Osmanya
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Old Uyghur
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written TTB.

name: Palmyrene
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Pau Cin Hau
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Proto-Cuneiform
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written LTR.

name: Proto-Elamite
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written LTR.

name: Old Permic
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Phags-pa
typography_quirks: Square script created by Lama Pagpa for Kublai Khan to write Mongol, Chinese, Tibetan. Written vertically top-to-bottom.

name: Inscriptional Pahlavi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Psalter Pahlavi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Book Pahlavi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Phoenician
typography_quirks: Consonantal alphabet without vowel notation. First widely used phonetic alphabet in the Mediterranean.

name: Miao (Pollard)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Klingon (KLI pIqaD)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Inscriptional Parthian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Proto-Sinaitic
typography_quirks: Proto-Sinaitic: the first alphabetic script, derived from Egyptian hieroglyphs, representing consonants phonetically. Ancestor of nearly every alphabet in use today.

name: Ranjana
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Rejang (Redjang, Kaganga)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Hanifi Rohingya
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Rongorongo
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written Boustrophedon.

name: Runic
typography_quirks: Straight-line designs optimized for carving into wood, stone, or bone. Vertical stems with diagonal branches. Left-to-right or right-to-left.

name: Samaritan
typography_quirks: Direct descendant of the Paleo-Hebrew script, retaining the old letter shapes while main-stream Hebrew adopted Aramaic square styles.

name: Sarati
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written TTB.

name: Old South Arabian
typography_quirks: Features highly symmetrical, geometric column-like letters. Often written in Boustrophedon (alternating LTR and RTL directions).

name: Saurashtra
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: (Small) Seal
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written TTB.

name: SignWriting
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Featural written TTB.

name: Shavian (Shaw)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Sharada, Śāradā
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Shuishu
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Logographic written TTB.

name: Siddham, Siddhaṃ, Siddhamātṛkā
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Sidetic
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Khudawadi, Sindhi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Sinhala
typography_quirks: Highly circular and ornate script. Involves complex ligature shaping. Used in Sri Lanka.

name: Sogdian
typography_quirks: Evolved from Aramaic. Parent of Old Uyghur, which parented Mongolian. Cursive connections.

name: Old Sogdian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abjad written RTL.

name: Sora Sompeng
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Soyombo
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Sundanese
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Sunuwar
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Syloti Nagri
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Syriac
typography_quirks: Cursive Eastern Aramaic script. Features three main scripts variants (Estrangela, Madnhaya, Serta). Contextual joining.

name: Tagbanwa
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Takri, Ṭākrī, Ṭāṅkrī
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Tai Le
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: New Tai Lue
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Tamil
typography_quirks: Highly simplified consonant system (no voiced/aspirated pairs). Features distinctive rounded, angular glyph shapes.

name: Tangut
typography_quirks: Extremely complex logographic script inspired by Chinese but with vastly more strokes per character. Hardest script to write.

name: Tai Viet
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Tai Yo
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Telugu
typography_quirks: Highly circular characters, originally adapted for writing on palm leaves without tearing them. Vowel marks hang above/around consonants.

name: Tengwar
typography_quirks: Featural script invented by J.R.R. Tolkien for the Elvish languages. Consonants indicate voicing and articulation place through stem/bow shapes.

name: Tifinagh (Berber)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Tagalog (Baybayin, Alibata)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Thaana
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written RTL.

name: Thai
typography_quirks: No word spacing. Tone marks and vowel marks are placed above, below, or beside the base consonant. Complex orthographic tone rules.

name: Tibetan
typography_quirks: Strong horizontal baseline. Features stackable consonants (subjoined letters) representing clusters.

name: Tirhuta
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Tangsa
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Todhri
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Tolong Siki
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Toto
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Tulu-Tigalari
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written LTR.

name: Ugaritic
typography_quirks: An alphabet shaped as cuneiform wedge-marks, used for the Ugaritic language.

name: Vai
typography_quirks: Independent syllabic system invented in Liberia. Consists of over 200 syllabic glyphs. Standardized in 1962.

name: Visible Speech
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Featural written LTR.

name: Vithkuqi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Warang Citi (Varang Kshiti)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Wancho
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written LTR.

name: Woleai
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Old Persian
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Cuneiform, Sumero-Akkadian
typography_quirks: Earliest known writing system. Wedge-shaped marks pressed into clay tablets using a stylus. Transitioned from logographs to a complex syllabary.

name: Yezidi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Alphabet written RTL.

name: Yi
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Syllabary written LTR.

name: Zanabazar Square (Zanabazarin Dörböljin Useg, Xewtee Dörböljin Bicig, Horizontal Square Script)
typography_quirks: A writing system of type Abugida written TTB.
